query:
INSERT INTO `accountPermissions` (`accountId`, `permissionKey`, `permissionName`, `isGranted`) 
SELECT id, '/', '首页', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'sales_test', 'finance_test', 'teacher_test', 'customer_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/orders', '订单管理', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'sales_test', 'finance_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/customers', '客户管理', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'sales_test', 'teacher_test', 'customer_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/sales', '销售管理', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'sales_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/schedules', '课程排课', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'sales_test', 'teacher_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/teachers', '老师管理', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/cities', '城市管理', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/finance', '财务管理', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'finance_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/reconciliation-match', '财务对账', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test', 'finance_test', 'partner_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/import', '数据导入', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/gmail-import', 'Gmail导入', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/parsing-learning', '解析学习', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test')
UNION ALL
SELECT id, '/accounts', '账号管理', true FROM systemAccounts WHERE username IN ('admin_test');
